name: Sol

planets.name: Mercury
planets.description: Scorch-laden metal mining colony.

planets.name: Venus
planets.description: Atmospheric research arrays floating in clouds.

planets.name: Earth
planets.description: Capital of the Alliance of Free Worlds.

planets.name: Mars
planets.description: Heavy planetary defense grids and shipyards.

description: The cradle of human civilization.

name: Valhalla Black Hole
description: A massive supermassive black hole. The sheer gravity well requires ships to exit jumps far out, making it a critical choke-point and trade gateway.

name: Sinistra Black Hole
description: A quiet, dark singularity nestled on the edge of Federation Territory. Jump corridors from here link deep into Free Space.

name: The Edge Black Hole
description: Marking the physical boundary of the Edge territory. It connects Ombra Space to the Core through highly unstable jump streams.

name: The Cradle

planets.name: Cradle Prime
planets.description: Highly advanced metropolitan areas covering vast archipelagos.

description: Considered the geometric and political center of the known galaxy. One of the founding systems of the Federation.

name: Holborn

planets.name: Holborn II
planets.description: Rich deposits of rare isotopes.

description: A quiet, lush system heavily integrated into the Core's trading network.

name: Vega

planets.name: Estinte
planets.description: Estinte is a largely Oceanic planet. It's climate is hot, but kept livable by the cooling effect of the ocean.

planets.name: Santa Madre
planets.description: Santa madre is a smaller and denser planet, further away and cooler than Estinte.

description: The Vega system is one of the rare systems with two earthlike planets. It's one of the founding systems of the federation.

name: Kelsen

planets.name: Kelsen III
planets.description: Helium-3 scoop-stations floating in the high atmospheres.

planets.name: Kelsen Prime
planets.description: The most populated planet in the Federation.

description: The primary fuel refining hub of the central Core. On of the founding systems of the Federation.

name: Fornax

planets.name: Fornax Major
planets.description: Automated geothermal drill rigs tapping the mantle.

description: A military fallback outpost guarding the Core's eastern frontier from external incursions.

name: Krane Daes
description: A dim white dwarf star acting as a key navigation beacon on the southern hyper-lanes.

name: Io

planets.name: Io Minor
planets.description: Extremely cold silicate planet containing hidden pirate coves.

description: A lawless system on the border of the Edge, where independent freelancers trade outside Union laws.

name: Betria

planets.name: Betria Prime
planets.description: Rich ecosystems but heavily isolated from core trade.

description: A remote planetary system situated deep within the southern edge of galactic space.

name: Rana

planets.name: Rana Secundus
planets.description: Home to deep-sea geothermal vents and scientific outposts.

description: A major customs and security gate leading into core Federation territory.

name: Shaula

planets.name: Shaula Prime
planets.description: A former colony world now under the absolute control of the Ombra fleet. The population lives in labor camps, overseen by the orbital fortress Vexilla-IV.

description: One of the first systems conquered by the Primus Vexillarius. The Ombra rule from their ancient colony ships, maintaining a strict military blockade.

name: Ghienna

planets.name: Ghienna Prime
planets.description: Agricultural planet supplying central systems.

description: A vital Breadbasket star system, linking the Core with outer Federation borders.

name: Aldhafera
description: A bright cyan system heavily defended by standard Federation patrols.

name: Kastra
description: A transit point with an automated hyper-beacons guiding commercial shipping lanes.

name: Enif
description: A small white star on the core periphery.

name: Pictor
description: Mining operations are scattered around this hot yellow dwarf's asteroid belt.

name: Minkar
description: A quiet peripheral system.

name: Meka
description: Known for hosting minor scientific arrays researching quantum mechanics.

name: Capella

planets.name: Capella Prime
planets.description: Home to private corporate retreats.

description: A peaceful yellow star tucked away in private Federation sectors.

name: Nashira
description: The strategic command center of the upper Federation. Extremely high military presence.

name: Zaniah
description: A white system supporting cargo networks and high-frequency beacons. The Ethife operate an automated relay here to assist with galactic freight management.

name: Terebel

planets.name: Terebel III
planets.description: Terebel III used to be a lush terrestrial planet, but was destroyed by a doomsday bomb. It still has a small group of people inhabiting it.

description: An outpost system at the northernmost sector of known star routes.

name: Adrianus

planets.name: Adrianus IV
planets.description: Rich heavy metal ores mined by automated heavy machinery.

description: An industrial star system supplying shipyards in Nashira.

name: Tyl
description: The eastern frontier sentinel of Federation Space.

name: Valhalla Nexus
description: An automated radar relay safeguarding the northern access to Valhalla's gravity well.

name: Valhalla South
description: A calm, uncolonized yellow dwarf system serving as a core refueling pitstop on the southern jump routes.

name: Vanguard Prime

planets.name: Vanguard Station Core
planets.description: A massive militarized biosphere shielding outer borders.

description: The spearhead base of the Alliance's outer defense fleet.

name: Vanguard Alpha
description: Unexplored system cataloged in the outer peripheral cloud of the Alliance sector.

name: Vanguard Beta
description: A dense asteroid belt system surrounding a small red dwarf.

name: Sinistra Minor
description: Peripheral sector beacon marking the extreme western border of Federation control.

name: Capella Minor
description: Lesser red dwarf system supporting regional communication relay dishes.

name: Adrianus Outpost
description: Scientific outpost studying high-radiation emissions from the neighboring jump nexus.

name: Terebel Outpost
description: Cold, desolate sector containing only an automated navigation lighthouse.

name: Ombra Outpost Alpha

planets.name: Alpha-1
planets.description: A desolate planetoid housing deep-surface cloning facilities.

description: A tactical monitoring system. The Ombra maintain a permanent fleet presence here to scan for incoming threats.

name: The Vexillarius Core

planets.name: Core-Prime
planets.description: The site of the Ombra's first arrival. The planet's resources are strip-mined to maintain the orbital fleet.

description: The administrative heart of Ombra space. The massive ancient ships of the Primus Vexillarius fleet form a permanent artificial ring around Core-Prime.

name: Void Sentry

planets.name: Sentry's End
planets.description: A swirling grey giant used for fuel harvesting by the Ombra fleet.

description: A strategic refueling station for Ombra long-range patrols.

name: Ombra Deep Outpost

planets.name: Deep Research-1
planets.description: A frozen world where the Ombra conduct experiments in cryo-stasis and cloning.

description: A remote orbital research lab positioned on the dangerous outer fringes, isolated from the rest of the fleet.

name: Maestia Gate
description: Heavy planetary defensive fort guarding the main hyperlane into the Empire.

name: Maestia Prime

planets.name: Crown World
planets.description: Lush paradise and administrative heart of the Maestia Dynasty.

description: The dazzling, crown-jewel capital of the Empire of Maestia.

name: Corona

planets.name: Gemma
planets.description: A planet very rich in different useful and pretty jewels, and other minerals.

description: Rich gemstone miner system, containing massive refinery platforms.

name: Titan Forge
description: Orbital macro-forges generating state-of-the-art warships for the imperial fleet.

name: Edge Sentinel
description: A monitoring node charting unpredictable gravitational pulses in the local dark-matter stream.

name: Terminus
description: The absolute southern terminus of official navigation charts. Beacons beyond this point are silent.

name: Outer Haven

planets.name: Haven City
planets.description: A safe haven city built inside hollowed out asteroid bodies.

description: An independent smuggler port and commercial oasis at the edge of the galaxy.

name: Lerna
description: An Alliance frontier system. The Ethife maintain a presence here to scan for valuable asteroid deposits in the outer cloud.

name: Hyperion

planets.name: Hyperion I
planets.description: Tidally locked rock orbiting dangerously close to the star.

planets.name: Hyperion Prime
planets.description: The jewel of the northern reach. Known for its massive vertical forests and orbital grain elevators.

planets.name: Theia
planets.description: A silicate moon with high-albedo ice sheets.

planets.name: Cronus
planets.description: A pale gold gas giant with a vast ring system.

description: A vital agricultural and trade hub connecting the northern frontier to the Alliance core.

name: Selene

planets.name: Lunar Prime
planets.description: Heavily cratered world with extensive underground tunnel networks.

planets.name: Selene Beta
planets.description: Dusty world known for its high-altitude lithium mining operations.

planets.name: Endymion
planets.description: Distant blue giant with methane storms.

description: A quiet mining system on the edge of the Valhalla influence zone.

name: Artemis

planets.name: Cynthia
planets.description: World covered entirely by deep water and sprawling floating cities.

planets.name: Delos
planets.description: Cold world used as a primary research and data storage vault for the Alliance.

planets.name: Leto
planets.description: Greenish gas giant with a volatile atmosphere.

planets.name: Ortygia
planets.description: Small, distant rock serving as a long-range scanning array.

description: A strategic junction system guarding the hyperlanes between Sol and the northern territories.

name: Ethife Prime

planets.name: The Shattered Cradle
planets.description: Once a thriving industrial world, it was destroyed by a doomsday bomb during the Great War. The planet is now a broken, irradiated shell that is nearly impossible to land on.

description: The home system of the Ethife. After their world was bombed, the survivors adapted to life in the asteroid belt. They are masters of low-gravity engineering and production. Having no interest in planetary territory, they maintain peaceful pacts with most of the galaxy, with the notable exception of the Ombra.

name: Aerith

planets.name: Aerith I
planets.description: A world of endless plains and massive Federation grain silos.

planets.name: Aerith II
planets.description: A swirling blue giant with helium-rich clouds.

planets.name: Cloud Reach
planets.description: A frozen moon serving as a long-range communications relay.

description: A system known for its massive agricultural output. Joined the federation recently, still has a fairly strong opposition.

name: Hairi

planets.name: Hairi Prime
planets.description: An independent water world famous for its deep-sea bioluminescent coral reefs.

planets.name: Mistral
planets.description: A windswept rock home to independent mining cooperatives.

description: A bustling independent system that serves as a neutral ground for traders from all factions.

name: Noriah

planets.name: Noriah I
planets.description: A blistering rock orbiting dangerously close to the star.

planets.name: Noriah Alpha
planets.description: A lush, green world with diverse ecosystems and massive city-states.

planets.name: Silt
planets.description: A harsh desert world with rich spice and mineral deposits.

description: A highly populated independent system known for its ancient ruins and thriving culture.

name: Shengong

planets.name: Shen I
planets.description: A barren world with high-gravity peaks.

planets.name: Gong Beta
planets.description: A purple-hued gas giant with a volatile ring system.

description: A quiet, spiritual system home to various independent philosophical orders.

name: Kalausi

planets.name: Kal I
planets.description: A world covered in perpetual snow and ice.

planets.name: Kalausi Prime
planets.description: The heart of the system, featuring vast oceans and bustling coastal cities.

planets.name: Usi
planets.description: A small gas giant with a moon rich in exotic gases.

description: A wealthy independent system thriving on maritime trade and high-tech industries.

name: Poerava

planets.name: Poerava I
planets.description: A tectonically active world used for geothermal power generation.

planets.name: Poerava II
planets.description: A dense rainforest world teeming with exotic flora and fauna.

description: A strategic Federation frontier system guarding the southern hyperlanes.

name: Shakh

planets.name: Shakh Prime
planets.description: A world of vast mesas and deep canyons, home to the Federation's finest pilots.

planets.name: Dust Cloud
planets.description: A rocky fragment surrounded by a permanent dust storm.

description: Famous for its military academy, Shakh is the cradle of Federation space superiority.

name: Bosona

planets.name: Bosona I
planets.description: A misty world of marshes and bioluminescent fungi.

planets.name: Gemstone
planets.description: A beautiful ice giant with crystalline rings.

description: A peripheral Federation system known for its unique biological exports.

name: Stribor

planets.name: Stribor I
planets.description: A cold world with massive glacier formations.

planets.name: Zephyr
planets.description: A giant with extremely fast wind speeds in its upper atmosphere.

description: An independent system focusing on atmospheric mining and research.

name: Veritate

planets.name: Veritate Prime
planets.description: A very hostile planet with flora and fauna that tries to kill you. It's incredibly rich in rare minerals used in high tech production.

planets.name: Echo
planets.description: A silent world with massive canyons that amplify sound.

description: A fairly isolated system with a tradition of warriors. Have recently been occupied by the federation, to a large part because of it's natural resources.

name: Krios

planets.name: Krios I
planets.description: A hardy world on the Alliance frontier with resilient ecosystems.

planets.name: Titan's Rest
planets.description: A massive brown giant with a calm, thick atmosphere.

description: A heavily fortified Alliance system guarding the western approaches.

name: Oceanus

planets.name: Oceanus Prime
planets.description: A world of archipelagos and vast, shallow seas.

planets.name: Tidal
planets.description: A moon with high volcanic activity beneath its icy crust.

description: The Alliance's primary maritime research and ship-building hub.

name: Tethys

planets.name: Tethys I
planets.description: A barren, cold world with rich silicate deposits.

planets.name: Deep Blue
planets.description: A magnificent blue giant with a complex system of 14 moons.

description: A quiet peripheral system used for long-range early warning scans.

name: Iapetus

planets.name: Iapetus Prime
planets.description: A highly developed world with diverse biomes and massive industrial zones.

planets.name: Cloud Top
planets.description: A giant with permanent electrical storms in its high atmosphere.

description: A key industrial center for the Alliance of Free Worlds.

name: Mnemosyne

planets.name: Mnemo I
planets.description: A quiet world home to the Alliance's primary archival vaults.

planets.name: Memory
planets.description: A crystalline moon that reflects the star's light brilliantly.

description: The cultural and historical heart of the Alliance's northern reach.

name: Phoebe

planets.name: Phoebe Prime
planets.description: A beautiful world with mild climates and extensive botanical gardens.

planets.name: Anulus Mundi
planets.description: A giant with the most spectacular ring system in the quadrant.

description: A peaceful residential and recreational system.

name: Coeus

planets.name: Coeus I
planets.description: A world of high peaks and thin atmosphere, used for advanced weapons testing.

planets.name: Storm's Eye
planets.description: A dark, stormy giant with massive methane cyclones.

description: A remote system dedicated to advanced military research and development.

name: Rhea

planets.name: Rhea Prime
planets.description: A world of tropical islands and coral reefs, a popular destination for travelers.

planets.name: Harvest
planets.description: A giant with several moons used for intensive hydro-farming.

description: The premier leisure and agricultural system in the western Alliance space.

name: Castrum Vexilla

planets.name: Vexilla-1
planets.description: A heavy industrial world producing cloning vats and ship components.

planets.name: Vexilla-2
planets.description: A source of atmospheric gases for the fleet.

description: A massive fortress system where the Ombra consolidate their military power.

name: Primus Station

planets.name: Primus-Alpha
planets.description: The primary agricultural world for the Ombra fleet, heavily monitored from orbit.

description: The staging ground for Ombra incursions into neighboring sectors.

name: Vexilla Secundus

planets.name: Secundus-A
planets.description: A rocky world used for live-fire military exercises.

description: A training system for Ombra warriors, where clone batches are battle-hardened.

name: Praetoria

planets.name: Praetoria-1
planets.description: A world dedicated to the production of high-tech weaponry for the fleet.

description: Home to the elite guard of the Primus Vexillarius fleet.

name: Ocularis

planets.name: Ocularis-Eye
planets.description: A cold giant whose moons house massive sensor arrays.

description: The eyes and ears of the Ombra fleet, monitoring hyperlane traffic for light years.

name: Golgotha

planets.name: Golgotha Prime
planets.description: A harsh world of mines and factories, under constant orbital bombardment if quotas aren't met.

description: A system synonymous with the Ombra's brutality and absolute rule.

name: Subjugatio

planets.name: Sub-1
planets.description: A newly conquered world currently being integrated into the Ombra labor machine.

description: A system where the Ombra break the will of newly conquered populations.

name: Fronteira

planets.name: Front-A
planets.description: A resource-rich giant on the edge of Ombra control.

description: The westernmost reach of the Ombra fleet, guarding the boundary of their expansion.

name: Clonus Hub

planets.name: Clonus-Prime
planets.description: The planetary surface is restricted entirely to cloning facilities and warrior growth chambers.

description: The biological heart of the Ombra, where the aging warrior pool is renewed through advanced technology.

name: Tangra

planets.name: Tangra-I
planets.description: A resource-rich but desolate rock, heavily strip-mined for its high-grade iron and titanium deposits.

description: A key industrial system for the Ethife. It provides the raw materials required for their massive production capacity.

name: Sansuna

planets.name: Sansuna-Gas
planets.description: A massive violet giant used for harvesting volatiles and hydrogen fuel through orbital siphons.

description: A desolate system vital for energy resources. The Ethife maintain complex mobile agricultural arrays in the system's goldilocks zone.

name: Merope

planets.name: Merope-Ice
planets.description: A cold, methane-ice world containing rare isotopes trapped within deep glaciers.

description: A cold and isolated system dedicated to scientific inquiry and isotope research, preserved since the system was cut off during the Great War.
